title: UFW + DNS sanity check for brain subdomain
userStory: As an operator, I want firewall and DNS posture verified so that brain.{domain} reaches Caddy and only Caddy.
acceptanceCriteria: UFW rules confirmed: allow 80, allow 443, default deny inbound for everything else
A-record for brain.{domain} resolves to VPS public IP and DNS propagation confirmed (dig +short)
fail2ban jail covering Caddy logs is active and includes the new vhost
Verify: curl https://brain.{domain} from laptop succeeds (TLS valid); request without bearer returns 401
